ValidationRule.description: You need to assign to a marketing user before to set the status "under construction"
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISBLANK( Assigned_to__c ) , ISPICKVAL( Status , "Under Construction"), NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please choose a marketing user to "Assigned to" in order for this user to receive all notifications about the approval process (approved or rejected)
